evaluators.name: Cheapest In-Office Whitening Thursday 3PM Appointment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked an appointment for the cheapest in-office teeth whitening under $400 with a 60–90 minute duration on a Thursday at 3:00 PM as a new patient.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Eligible Veneer Material Financing Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user chose the more affordable veneer material for 4 teeth under $3,000 and saved/applied for a financing plan with monthly payments under $150, preferring 0% interest.

evaluators.name: Nearest Sunday-Open Clinic Emergency Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted an emergency contact request for a broken tooth with 2-hour timeframe to the nearest clinic within 15 miles of ZIP 94103 that is open Sundays and has emergency care.

evaluators.name: Top-Rated Female Cosmetic Dentist Consultation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a 10:00 AM in-person consultation within 14 days with the top-rated female cosmetic dentist meeting the experience and rating criteria.

evaluators.name: Smile Assessment Best Eligible Treatment Email Estimate Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user completed the smile assessment, then requested an emailed estimate for a treatment from the recommendations that is under $2,500, under 6 months, and has the highest satisfaction rating among eligible options.

evaluators.name: New-Patient March Offer Tuesday 9AM Appointment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user selected a valid March 2026 new-patient exam/X-ray/cleaning offer under $199 and requested an appointment on a Tuesday in March 2026 at 9:00 AM using that offer.

evaluators.name: Invisalign 0% Plan ≤$200/mo Application Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user used the financing calculator to configure a 0% interest Invisalign plan for $4,800 with monthly payments at or below $200 and submitted a financing application for that plan, ideally with desired monthly payment around $200.

evaluators.name: Composite Bonding Favorites and Second-Case Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user favorited the first two composite bonding front-teeth cases completed in 1–2 visits and then submitted a case inquiry based on the second of those cases.
